title: Beer Duck
description: This is a simple texture pack that replaces a totem with a beer duck
body:
**Replaces your totem with a beer duck. Now you don't have to worry about your life the beer duck will help you.**
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f553022f7d1fd0629d8f437c4636121ba85a3af2_0.webp)
In order for the totem to appear, you need to change it in the anvil “beer duck”.
